entity.summary: Cryptocurrency exchange launched in 2023 after Binance announced the sale of its Russian business to CommEX. CommEX later announced a staged shutdown beginning on 2024-03-25, with full website access scheduled to close on 2024-05-10.
entity.notes: HEI treats CommEX as a separate exchange entity from Binance because it operated under a distinct CommEX brand and domain after Binance announced the sale of its Russian business. death_reason is voluntary_shutdown because available reporting describes a staged operator-announced closure rather than a hack, insolvency, or enforcement shutdown. The original domain's current redirect or dead-domain state is not asserted without a fresh URL verification, so official_url_status remains unknown.

events.title: CommEX became the destination for Binance Russia business transition
events.description: Binance announced that it had agreed to sell its Russian business to CommEX and would gradually wind down exchange services and other Russian business lines while migrating users to the CommEX platform.
events.notes: Used as the public launch/market-entry marker because CommEX was publicly identified through the Binance Russia business transition.

events.title: CommEX announced staged service suspension
events.description: CommEX announced that operations would begin suspending on 2024-03-25 and that access to the website would fully close on 2024-05-10.
events.notes: Used as the operator-announced shutdown marker.

events.title: CommEX website access scheduled to close
events.description: CommEX's staged closure schedule set 2024-05-10 as the full website-access closure date, making it the terminal exchange-service marker for HEI.
events.notes: Used as the death_date because the publicly reported closure schedule named this date for full access closure.

evidence.title: Binance announced exit from Russia and sale of Russian business
evidence.notes: Business media report confirming Binance's agreement to sell its Russian business to CommEX and wind down Russian exchange services.

evidence.title: CommEX background reference
evidence.notes: Used only as a secondary cross-check for CommEX's Seychelles registration context, 2023 founding year, and closure chronology.

evidence.title: CommEX crypto exchange to suspend operations from March 25
evidence.notes: Reports CommEX's staged suspension beginning 2024-03-25 and planned full access closure on 2024-05-10.

evidence.title: CommEX crypto exchange to suspend operations from March 25
evidence.notes: Used as the source for 2024-05-10 as CommEX's full website-access closure date.

evidence.title: CommEX original domain archive
evidence.notes: Archive-first access for preserving the original CommEX domain as historical evidence.
